must_not_be_committed: Copy this template to a private evidence repository before adding real site evidence, owner records, survey logs, coordinates, photos, or contact information.
description: Private post-score scaffold for independent field evidence. This is not a withheld-label file and must not be used by the blind runner.

independent_field_evidence.redaction_notes: Do not include secrets, private landowner data, controlled facility details, or exact private coordinates in public report packages.

claim_boundary: Independent field evidence is required before any confirmed-void, hazard, object, or drill-target claim. Model detections and validation score reports alone are candidate evidence only.
